error_signature: console.log not appearing in Docker logs
title: Console logs from Code node not appearing in Docker logs
symptom: Despite using `console.log` in the Code node, the output does not appear in the Docker logs, making debugging difficult.
not_this_if: Using console methods other than console.log
root_cause: In n8n, `console.log` statements in the Code node are intended for the browser console and do not output to Docker logs. Other console methods like `console.warn` or `console.error` are not implemented.
fix_steps: Use browser developer tools to view console logs instead of relying on Docker logs.
Consider using alternative logging methods or nodes for capturing logs.
agent_instruction: Check the browser console for logs instead of Docker logs.
